calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-31-2005 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this date as scheduled for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference
Judge Pro Tem: Sandra McNabb Clerk: Anna Redigonda Court Reporter: Joann Bryce.
Hannah Peters, Esq. present representing Plaintiff
Mary Ann Meany, Esq. (Limited Scope Attorney) present for Defendants
Plaintiff present.
Defendants Dennis Norrman and Genette Norman present.
Case settles on the record as follows:
Defendants have 90 days to surrender premises, which is Nov. 29, 05, 12:00 PM.
Plaintiff will hand over title to vehicle to Defendants before move out date.
If Plaintiff does not hand over title to vehicle before move out date, move out date is extended until title is handed over to defendants.
Mutual waiver of all claims and waiver of rent and daily rent damages.
Once Defendants move out, Plaintiff will file dismissal.
Each side to bear their own costs and fees.
No Judgmenet entered this date.
Judgment will be entered only if agreement is breached.
Plaintiff present agrees to terms stated on the record.
Defendants present agree to terms stated on the record.

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
